stemHtml: ATC: "OO-IMC, Lille information, squawk 6120, QNH 1025, ceiling broken 2500 feet." How would ATS transmit these numbers?

options.a: squawk six one two zero, QNH one zero two five, broken two five zero zero.
options.b: squawk sixty-one twenty, QNH one zero two five, broken two thousand five hundred.
options.c: squawk sixty-one twenty, QNH one zero two five, broken two five zero zero.
options.d: squawk six one two zero, QNH one zero two five, broken two thousand five hundred.
